series_metadata.series_title: Statewide Enforcement Tracking System(SETS) Public Assistance Refunds
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting Public Assistance payments that were sent to the State in error. The SETS/PA Refund process was created to reimburse clients for the overpayment of child support collections sent to ODJFS.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office and 5 years in Records Center
